Package org.rodinp.internal.core.builder

Class ExtractorDescription

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.builder.ExecutableExtensionDesc
org.rodinp.internal.core.builder.ExtractorDescription
public class ExtractorDescription extends ExecutableExtensionDesc
Description of an extractor registered with the tool manager.

Implements lazy class loading for the extractor.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExtractorDescription

      public ExtractorDescription(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IConfigurationElement configElement, ToolDescription toolDescription)
      Creates a new extractor decription.
      Parameters:
      configElement - description of this extractor in the Eclipse registry
      toolDescription - description of the tool associated to this extractor
